title: Velvety Sherry Sauce
description: A rich and decadent sauce made with sherry and butter, perfect for serving over vegetables or meat.
instructions: In a small saucepan, melt the butter over medium heat.
Add the sherry and vinegar to the saucepan, stirring to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 5-7 minutes, or until it has thickened slightly.
Serve the velvety sherry sauce over vegetables or meat.
